strings.KEYWORD_POISON: @@H2@@ Fac damnum par 10% eorum maximam salutem supra 10 *. Venenum non potest occidere inimicos.
strings.KEYWORD_SONIC_BOOM: <style=cKeywordName>Sonic Boom</style>@H2@@<style=cIsUtility> Pellit</style> Omnes inimicos ferientes. <style=cIsUtility> pellat te retro:</style> si aerium es.</style>.
strings.KEYWORD_WEAK: <style=cKeywordName>WAKEN</style>@H2@@ Reduce motum celeritatem ac damnum per <style=cIsDamage>40%</style>. Reducere arma ab <style=cIsDamage>20</style>.</style> .
strings.KEYWORD_HEAVY: <style=cKeywordName>Heavy</style><style=cSub> Disciplina plus damni facit quam citius movearis.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_FREEZING: <style=cKeywordName>Glacians</style><style=cSub> Congelat hostes in loco. Hostes glaciati ad valetudinem nullam interficiuntur.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_STUNNING: <style=cKeywordName>STUNNNING</style>@H2@@ Interrumpit inimicos et breviter eos stupefacit.
strings.KEYWORD_EXPOSE: <style=cKeywordName>Expositio</style><style=cSub>Feriens hostes expositos omnem tempus refrigerationis artium tuarum per <style=cIsUtility>1.0s</style> minuit, <style=cIsDamage>damnum additionale</style> faciendum.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_SHOCKING: <style=cKeywordName> Improbus</style>@H2@@ Interrumpit inimicos ac stupefacit. Stupor tollitur si scopus plus quam <style=cIsHealth>10%</style> eorum maximam valetudinem in damnis accipit.
strings.KEYWORD_SLAYER: <style=cKeywordName>Necator</style><style=cSub> Facit <style=cIsDamage>3x</style> damni contra hostes valetudinis humilis.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_IGNITE: <style=cKeywordName>Ignite</style>@H2@@ Fac additamentum <style=cIsDamage>+50%</style> Totum damnum in tempore.
strings.KEYWORD_WEAKPOINT: <style=cKeywordName> Infirmum punctum</style>@H2@@ Sectiones inimicorum notantur ac continentes <style=cIsDamage> Infirmis Points</style>. Hitting a <style=cIsDamage> infirmam Point</style> spondet a <style=cIsDamage>Critical Strike</style>.
strings.KEYWORD_ACTIVERELOAD: <style=cKeywordName>Recharga Activa</style><style=cSub> Recharga tuum railgun cum incendendo. Recharga perfecta damnum auget.</style>
strings.KEYWORD_VOIDCORRUPTION: <style=cKeywordName> Corruption</style><style=cSub> Lucrum Corruptionis damnum accipiendo, Ictus Criticis adhibendis, vel Items Vacuas tenentes. Sanando minuere corruptionem.</style>
